title: Sam Lokanc
text:
About
I am a Data Scientist based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada. I have recently graduated from the Master of Data Science program at the University of British Columbia. Prior to this, I received a Bachelor of Health Sciences degree in Bioinformatics from the University of Calgary.
In the past I have conducted research investigating the intersection of cancer and the immune system utilizing data-driven approaches. These experiences supplied me with a skillset that is generalizable to a wide range of exciting problems, such as wildlife conservation and epidemiology.
Feel free to check out some of my projects (both professional and personal) as well as my resume on this website!
